subcodes.title: Prayers for the days of the week
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath created the heavens and the earth by His command, and beyond them those who have believed in God and His signs and who shall be gathered unto Him. O God! Thou art indeed God, the Single, the One, the Eternal, the Ever-Living, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی خلق السموات و الارض بامره ثم الذین آمنوا بالله و آیاته الی الله یحشرون اللهم انک انت الله الفرد الاحد الصمد الحی القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @essential vs. actional attributes of God, @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
